name: Blondies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan.
2. Stir the brown sugar into the butter until it is dissolved.
3. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
4. Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
5. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Mix the dry ingredients into the butter, sugar, egg, and vanilla mixture.
7. Butter a 9-inch square pan and line it with wax paper.
8. Butter and flour the wax paper.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-45 minutes, or until set.
